title: lastrea deparioides
intro: Lastrea deparioides, also known as the Himalayan fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea, native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lastrea deparioides include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lastrea deparioides are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are commonly used in traditional medicine in the Himalayan region.
